title: anthyllis vulneraria proles valesiaca
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria proles valesiaca, also known as Valesian kidney vetch, is a plant species in the pea family that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which are believed to aid in wound healing and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Valesian kidney vetch include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support kidney function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of Valesian kidney vetch often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and address specific health needs.
